title: Overdrive
description:
A high-performance Fabric modpack based on Fabulously Optimized,
enhanced with extra FPS tweaks and the Feather Remake client mod.
body:
[![FAST](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e81436885d7d199d80ffde632b0895d24a2c72b.png)](https://fastclient.net/ashmeetop)

# ⚡ Overdrive Optimised

**Overdrive Optimised** is a **high-performance Fabric modpack** based on **Fabulously Optimized**, further refined with additional optimizations, better defaults, and a **custom Feather Remake client mod** to deliver a smooth, fast, and modern Minecraft experience.

This modpack is built for players who want **maximum FPS**, **fast loading times**, and **client-side quality-of-life features** without sacrificing stability or compatibility.

---

## 🚀 Key Features

### 🧠 Extreme Performance

* Built on **Fabulously Optimized** – one of the best FPS modpacks available
* Additional performance tweaks and optimised configs
* Reduced stutter, faster chunk loading, and smoother gameplay
* Designed for **low-end and high-end PCs**

### 🎨 Feather Remake (Custom Client Mod)

* Feather-style UI and client features
* Enhanced menus and visual polish
* Client-side improvements without affecting servers
* Seamlessly integrated into the modpack

### ⚙️ Smart Defaults

* Carefully tuned settings so you don’t need to configure anything
* Works out of the box with great performance
* Balanced visuals and speed

### 🧩 High Compatibility

* 100% Fabric-based
* Works on **most servers** (purely client-side)
* Compatible with shaders, resource packs, and most Fabric mods

---

## 🖥️ Who Is This Modpack For?

✔ Players who want **higher FPS**
✔ Laptop & low-end PC users
✔ PvP players who want smooth gameplay
✔ Players who like **Feather-style client features**
✔ Anyone tired of lag and long loading screens

---

## 📦 Included Mod Categories

* Performance & rendering optimizations
* Memory and CPU usage improvements
* UI & client enhancements
* Bug fixes and stability improvements

> No unnecessary gameplay mods.
> No forced content changes.
> Just **speed, stability, and polish**.

---

## 📥 Installation

1. Install **Fabric Loader**
2. Use **Modrinth App** (recommended)
3. Download **Overdrive Optimised**
4. Launch and enjoy 🚀

---

## ⚠️ Important Notes

* This modpack is **client-side only**
* You can join **vanilla and modded servers**
* Shaders are optional and supported
* Performance depends on your system and settings

---

## ❤️ Credits & Thanks

* **Fabulously Optimized** – base modpack and inspiration
* All mod authors whose work makes this possible
* Minecraft & Fabric community

Full credit is given to original mod authors.
No mods are redistributed against their licenses.

---

## 🛠️ Feedback & Support

Found a bug? Have a suggestion?

* Use the **Issues** tab on Modrinth
* Performance feedback is always welcome

---

### ⚡ Overdrive Optimised

**Push your Minecraft performance beyond the limit.**
